tasks.label: write-validation-report
tasks.command:
cat > docs/validation-report-2025-12-22.md <<'EOF'
# Validation Report

**Document:** docs/Architecture.md
**Checklist:** bmad/bmm/workflows/3-solutioning/architecture/checklist.md
**Date:** 2025-12-22

## Summary
- Overall: 10/98 passed (10%)
- Critical Issues: versions, auth/infra gaps, missing structure/patterns, no agent-ready detail

## Section Results

### 1) Decision Completeness
- ✗ Every critical decision category resolved — No decision table; only high-level services [docs/Architecture.md#L17-L22]
- ✗ All important decision categories addressed — Missing auth, deployment, patterns [docs/Architecture.md#L17-L22]
- ✓ No placeholder text — No TBDs found
- ⚠ Optional decisions resolved/deferred — Not stated; enforcement covered but auth/deploy missing
- ✓ Data persistence decided — SQLite/PostgreSQL via Prisma [docs/Architecture.md#L12-L15][docs/Architecture.md#L22-L22]
- ✓ API pattern chosen — REST endpoints listed [docs/Architecture.md#L41-L46]
- ✗ Authentication/authorization defined — Not covered
- ✗ Deployment target selected — Not covered
- ⚠ All FRs supported — Enforcement/real-time covered, but auth/deploy gaps

### 2) Version Specificity
All ✗ — No versions for Node/React/Fastify/Socket.IO/Prisma/DB; no verification dates; no LTS vs latest discussion.

### 3) Starter Template Integration
All ➖ N/A — No starter template referenced.

### 4) Novel Pattern Design
All ➖ N/A — No novel patterns claimed or described.

### 5) Implementation Patterns
- ✗ Naming patterns — None
- ✗ Structure patterns — None
- ✗ Format patterns — None
- ✗ Communication patterns — Events listed but no conventions [docs/Architecture.md#L35-L39]
- ✗ Lifecycle patterns — None
- ✗ Location patterns — None
- ✗ Consistency patterns — None
- ✗ Concrete examples — None
- ✗ Conventions unambiguous — Missing
- ✗ Patterns cover all tech — Missing
- ✗ No gaps for agents — Missing
- ✗ No conflicts — Not discussed

### 6) Technology Compatibility
- ✓ DB compatible with ORM — SQLite/PostgreSQL with Prisma [docs/Architecture.md#L12-L15][docs/Architecture.md#L22-L22]
- ⚠ Frontend framework compatible with deployment — Deployment target not stated
- ✗ Auth solution works across stack — Auth absent
- ✓ API pattern consistent — REST only [docs/Architecture.md#L41-L46]
- ➖ Starter template compatibility — N/A
- ➖ Third-party services — None specified
- ⚠ Real-time fits deployment — Socket.IO noted, deploy target absent [docs/Architecture.md#L13-L15][docs/Architecture.md#L35-L38]
- ➖ File storage — Not in scope
- ➖ Background jobs — Not in scope

### 7) Document Structure
- ✗ Executive summary (2-3 sentences) — None
- ✗ Project initialization section — None
- ✗ Decision summary table (Category/Decision/Version/Rationale) — Missing
- ✗ Project structure/source tree — Missing
- ✗ Implementation patterns section — Missing
- ✗ Novel patterns section — Missing
- ⚠ Source tree reflects decisions — Not present
- ✓ Technical language consistent — Mostly concise service descriptions [docs/Architecture.md#L17-L63]
- ⚠ Tables vs prose — No tables; short list only
- ✓ No unnecessary explanations — Concise
- ⚠ Focus on WHAT/HOW — Some WHAT, limited HOW (no deployment/auth/pattern detail)

### 8) AI Agent Clarity
- ⚠ No ambiguous decisions — Gaps on auth/deploy/patterns leave ambiguity
- ⚠ Clear boundaries — Services listed but no interfaces/contracts [docs/Architecture.md#L17-L22]
- ✗ File organization patterns — None
- ✗ Common operation patterns — None
- ➖ Novel patterns guidance — N/A (none defined)
- ✗ Constraints for agents — Few constraints beyond enforcement
- ✗ Conflicting guidance — None stated, but missing guidance dominates
- ✗ Implementation readiness — Agents would guess auth/deploy/patterns
- ✗ File paths/naming — None
- ✗ Integration points — Not specified beyond sockets/APIs
- ✗ Error handling patterns — None
- ✗ Testing patterns — None

### 9) Practical Considerations
- ⚠ Stack has support — Implied mainstream stack, but no evidence/versions
- ⚠ Dev env setup with versions — Not provided
- ✓ No experimental tech — All mainstream
- ⚠ Deployment target supports tech — Not stated
- ➖ Starter stability — N/A
- ⚠ Scalability: expected load — Not discussed
- ⚠ Data model growth — Basic entities only
- ⚠ Caching strategy — None
- ⚠ Background jobs — None
- ⚠ Novel pattern scalability — N/A (no novel patterns)

### 10) Common Issues to Check
- ✓ Not overengineered — Minimal
- ⚠ Standard patterns used — Stack standard, but patterns undocumented
- ✗ Complex tech justified — Not discussed
- ⚠ Maintenance complexity appropriate — Not addressed
- ✓ No obvious anti-patterns — None evident
- ✗ Performance bottlenecks addressed — Not addressed
- ✗ Security best practices — Absent
- ✗ Future migration paths — Not covered
- ➖ Novel patterns follow principles — N/A

## Failed Items
- Versions/spec verification absent; no auth/authorization; no deployment target; missing decision table, project structure, implementation patterns, file naming, error/testing patterns; enforcement/pattern details shallow; scalability/caching/background jobs absent.

## Partial Items
- Functional coverage: real-time/enforcement covered but auth/deploy missing.
- Compatibility: deployment target unspecified; mainstream stack assumed.
- Clarity: boundaries listed but no interfaces/contracts.
- Practical: stack mainstream but no versioning or ops guidance.

## Recommendations
1. Must Fix: Add decision summary table with versions (Node/React/TS/Fastify/Socket.IO/Prisma/DB) and auth/authorization + deployment target; define project structure and file conventions; add implementation patterns (naming, formats, events, errors, testing).
2. Should Improve: Add scalability/caching/background-job stance; specify error handling and retries; document API response formats and event payloads; include auth flow and role model.
3. Consider: Add sequence/flow diagrams for session/enforcement/AI; add non-functional targets (performance, availability) and monitoring/logging approach.
EOF
